name: Or
longDescription: Pipeline generator that creates variants from a list of alternatives. Each branch is one option. Use pick/arrange to select combinations or permutations instead of trying each individually.

parameters.name: pick
parameters.description: Unordered selection size (combinations). Single int or [from, to] range.

parameters.name: arrange
parameters.description: Ordered selection size (permutations). Single int or [from, to] range.

parameters.name: then_pick
parameters.description: Second-order combination selection on primary results.

parameters.name: then_arrange
parameters.description: Second-order permutation selection on primary results.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of generated variants (0 = no limit).

parameters.name: _seed_
parameters.description: Seed for deterministic/reproducible generation.

name: Cartesian
longDescription: Creates all combinations by crossing multiple stages. Each branch is a stage containing options. The Cartesian product of all stages generates the full set of pipeline variants.

parameters.name: pick
parameters.description: Select combinations from the generated complete pipelines.

parameters.name: arrange
parameters.description: Select permutations from the generated complete pipelines.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of generated variants (0 = no limit).

parameters.name: _seed_
parameters.description: Seed for deterministic/reproducible generation.

name: Grid
description: Generator: grid search over parameter values
longDescription: Generates all combinations (Cartesian product) of parameter values. Each branch maps a parameter name to a list of values to try. Produces one variant per combination.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of generated variants (0 = no limit).

parameters.name: _seed_
parameters.description: Seed for deterministic/reproducible sampling when count is set.

name: Zip
longDescription: Pairs values from multiple parameter lists by position (like Python's zip). Each branch maps a parameter name to a list of values. Stops at the shortest list.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of generated variants (0 = no limit).

parameters.name: _seed_
parameters.description: Seed for deterministic/reproducible sampling when count is set.

name: Chain
longDescription: Expands configurations sequentially in order. Each branch is a configuration variant. Unlike _or_ which may randomize selection, _chain_ preserves the defined order.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Limit to first N items (or random N if seed is set, 0 = no limit).

parameters.name: _seed_
parameters.description: Seed for random sampling instead of taking first N.

name: Sample
longDescription: Generates random parameter values from a specified statistical distribution (uniform, log_uniform, normal/gaussian, choice).

parameters.name: distribution
parameters.description: Statistical distribution to sample from.

options.label: Uniform
options.description: Uniform distribution between from and to

options.label: Choice
options.description: Random selection from a list of values

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Lower bound (uniform/log_uniform).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Upper bound (uniform/log_uniform).

parameters.name: mean
parameters.description: Mean value (normal/gaussian).

parameters.name: std
parameters.description: Standard deviation (normal/gaussian).

parameters.name: num
parameters.description: Number of samples to generate.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of results (0 = no limit).

parameters.name: _seed_
parameters.description: Seed for deterministic/reproducible sampling.

name: Range
longDescription: Generates a numeric sequence from start to end (inclusive) with optional step. Use for linear parameter sweeping.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start value (inclusive).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End value (inclusive).

parameters.name: step
parameters.description: Step size between values.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Limit to N random samples (0 = no limit).

parameters.name: _seed_
parameters.description: Seed for deterministic sampling when count is set.

name: LogRange
longDescription: Generates logarithmically-spaced values between start and end. Essential for hyperparameter grids spanning multiple orders of magnitude (e.g. learning rates).

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start value (positive).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End value (positive).

parameters.name: num
parameters.description: Number of log-spaced values to generate.

parameters.name: base
parameters.description: Logarithm base (must be > 0 and != 1).

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Limit to N random samples (0 = no limit).

parameters.name: _seed_
parameters.description: Seed for deterministic sampling when count is set.
